column3: "Elder boosts immunity" refers to its role as a plant that enhances the body's defenses.
"Elder reduces inflammation" refers to its natural ability to minimize redness, swelling, and pain due to bodily irritations.
"Elder soothes sore throat" refers to its ability to provide relief from throat discomfort caused by inflammation or irritation.
"Elder promotes heart health" refers to its ability to improve blood circulation and lower cholesterol levels.

"Elder fights cancer" refers to its use of a specific plant or herb as an alternative treatment for people
         facing life-threatening illnesses.
"Elder relieves pain" refers to its use for alleviating discomfort or aching body parts.
"Elder improves digestion" refers to its ability to help the body break down food more efficiently.
"Elder lowers blood sugar" refers to its ability to help control glucose levels in the body, which can be helpful for individuals dealing with diabetes or other related conditions.
"Elder enhances mental clarity" refers to its ability to boost cognitive performance in an individual, resulting in sharper focus and improved memory.
"Elder supports skin health" refers to its ability to aid and nurture healthy-looking skin due to containing specific substances.
